origin.name: Mozambique
origin.key_document: Certidao de obito (death certificate from Conservatoria do Registo Civil, requires certified English translation)
origin.source: FCDO Mozambique travel advice, updated 2025; British High Commission Maputo guidance
origin.cremation_note: Cremation in Mozambique is available. Bringing ashes home to the UK is an option alongside full body repatriation.

destinations.name: United Kingdom
key_documents: Certidao de obito (certified English translation required)
special_rules: All Portuguese-language documentation requires certified English translation for UK acceptance.
Police clearance is required for all violent or suspicious deaths.
An export permit from Mozambican authorities is required for all repatriations.
Embalming must be carried out by a licensed funeral director before air transport.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All documentation must be in certified English translation. The coroner for the district is notified. Straightforward cases proceed directly to funeral arrangements.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. The British High Commission in Maputo can register the death and advise on local funeral directors. They cannot pay for or arrange repatriation.
destinations.seo_title: Mozambique to UK Repatriation: Guidance for Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Mozambique. Repatriation to the UK takes 2-4 weeks. Registo Civil, Portuguese translation, and export permits all handled. Contact us 24/7.
